sets.name: Frostwarden
sets.blurb: Ice that remembers the ridge wind.

bonuses.blurb: Full Frostwarden — the ridge fights with you.
Full Mistwalker — you are a rumor with arrows.
Full Thorncloak — the grove armors you.

sets.name: Hearthguard
sets.blurb: Armor that warms allies within a step.

bonuses.blurb: Full Hearthguard — no one fights alone.

sets.name: Ravenmark
sets.blurb: Corv's census inked into steel and feather.

bonuses.blurb: Full Ravenmark — the census fights back.

sets.name: Goblinroad
sets.blurb: Scrap-metal pride from the crooked trail.

sets.name: Leyhound
sets.blurb: Arcane leather that hums when dogs howl.

bonuses.blurb: Full Leyhound — pack and mage as one.
Full Ashcrown — destiny clears its throat.
